product_results.title: Nike Womens Air Force 1 Mid 07 Le Hi-Top Trainers

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be great quality with an amazing appearance that they like. The shoes are durable, though some mention they can be easy to break. Customers are satisfied with the fabric. However, opinions are mixed regarding the fit and comfort of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: They fit nicely, and look amazing.
authors_reviews.author: Tim Porter

authors_reviews.title: The best
authors_reviews.text: Best boot or shoe I’ve ever owned. I’ve got wide feet in a size 12 and these are great for walking long distances, working in the yard, anything other than running or athletic activities. I own 2 pairs. I had a 3rd pair before that, but the dog chewed it.
authors_reviews.author: John Zelowsky

authors_reviews.title: Great Tee
authors_reviews.text: True to size and great price delivered right to the door!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Conforme à la description
authors_reviews.text: La qualité est là et la grandeur est bonne.
authors_reviews.author: louisette

authors_reviews.title: Super pretty t-shirt!
authors_reviews.text: Very good fabric and super pretty t-shirt!
authors_reviews.author: ADRIANA LEMOS DA SILVA

authors_reviews.title: Nike Roshe are too light& delivery are on time
authors_reviews.text: Too small to my feet,I love roshe but the only problem cnnt fit for my expectation.Thank you Nike for free & refunded the cost,happy to donate for those who need because of the pandemic it’s free & no need to return the items.Delivery is always on time & fast..Thank you NIKE ROSHE ...
authors_reviews.author: vicky

authors_reviews.title: Great price for a great shoe.
authors_reviews.text: I have only been using these for the last few weeks in the gym. But so far so good, they are a sturdy shoe which is easy to break it. The do not feel cheap or like they are going to fall apart. Good purchase imo.
authors_reviews.author: Frequent Shopper

authors_reviews.title: Bought as A gift - Well Loved
authors_reviews.text: My nephew will ONLY wear these socks. We bought these for him as part of a gift and he absolutely loves them!
authors_reviews.author: Tracy
